title: Blossom wine
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Food |image=[[File:Blossom_Wine.jpg]] |name=Blossom wine |origin=[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]][[Empire 19|''Empire'' 19]] |date= |race= |creator= |found=*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]''[[The Old Republic: Deceived]]'' *Naboo[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] *[[Void Station]] |type= |description=Pale [[Color/Legends|yellow]], [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] liquid |animals= |plants=Different [[Flower/Legends|flower]] blossoms{{StoryCite|story=End Game|book=Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|bformatted=''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization, 2012 edition}} |other= |edible=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |inedible= |potable= |nutrition= |effects= |dishes= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Bring wine for Naboo's celebrated Senator.''"
"''Thank you, Majesty. I've gone without blossom wine for too long.''"
"''Then bring him two goblets, and keep the supply flowing until his thirst is slaked.|[[King/Legends|King]] [[Ars Veruna/Legends|Ars Veruna]] and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]]|}} '''Blossom wine''' was a rare, fragrant [[Wine/Legends|wine]] created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] by distilling natural essences of different [[Flower/Legends|flower]] blossoms. ==History== In [[3653 BBY]], during the [[Sacking of Coruscant]], [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] [[Adraas]] and [[Darth Angral]] drank some blossom [[Wine/Legends|wine]] in the office of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Berooken]], whom Angral had brutally [[Death/Legends|murdered]]. The two [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] thought that it was an excellent vintage, but "right at the end of its cellar life." During the reigns of [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Kings]] [[Bon Tapalo/Legends|Bon Tapalo]] and [[Ars Veruna/Legends|Ars Veruna]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], blossom wine was often served. At the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|blockade of Naboo]], the wine was manufactured at the [[Summit Farm Blossom Winery]], a [[Farm/Legends|farm]] situated in the [[Gallo Mountains/Legends|Gallo Mountains]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], on [[Void Station]], a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] named [[Jib Kopatha]] offered [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] some "delicacies" in order to calm down the Sith Lord's anger. One of them was a brunette [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] [[Unidentified Naboo female|woman]] with a bottle of blossom wine, who painfully reminded Vader of his late wife, [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Old Republic: Deceived]]'' {{Ab|The Old Republic: Deceived (audiobook)}} *[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}} *{{StoryCite|story=End Game|book=Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|bformatted=''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization, 2012 edition}} {{Mo}} *[[Empire 19|''Empire'' 19]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Naboo food]] [[Category:Wines]]
